passedAssertions.reason: AI_PROVIDERS defines exactly two providers, Anthropic and OpenAI.
Fresh settings/config default aiProvider to openai, giving new users a sensible pre-selected provider.
Provider changes are persisted into localStorage through ConfigProvider/saveLocalConfig and restored on reopen via getLocalConfig.
The Model control is gated behind selectedProvider.models.length > 1; both supported providers expose only one model, so no model dropdown renders for either provider.
API key input defaults to password, toggles to text via eye button, and persists because changes flow through onSave/setConfig into localStorage.
Placeholder and help link are sourced from the selected provider metadata, which differs for Anthropic and OpenAI and updates on provider switch.
Legacy gemini localStorage values are migrated to DEFAULT_SETTINGS (openai/gpt-5.4) and API key cleared, preventing crashes and invalid provider display.

Settings persistence is implemented via ConfigProvider/localStorage, and AI commit/PR generation always resolves the model from the current provider using getModelForProvider before invoking backend commands.

summary: The assigned AI settings assertions were validated via repo-inspection fallback because the shared web UI at http://localhost:4158 timed out and could not be browser-tested. Source inspection supports all assigned assertions as implemented, but live browser evidence remains blocked until the frontend becomes reachable.
